changelog: Cloud migration export now opens reliably in the self-hosted admin and downloads a valid SaaS migration package
Migration export no longer loads full tables just to show counts, reducing memory pressure on large helpdesks
Migration packages now tolerate invalid legacy text encoding and show clear server readiness diagnostics for ZipArchive and backups
IMAP email ingest includes the shared-hosting pseudo-cron fallback for servers without reliable cron or loopback requests
New ticket forms no longer carry over the previous company or assignee selection after a ticket is created
Work, inbox, global search, client overview, reporting, billable item adjustments, and compact sidebar flows are included
